positive: Stylized celestial compass rose design, featuring geometric constellations, mythological winged creatures, and flowing arcane calligraphy, rendered in a modern retro-futuristic Art Deco style. The composition is centrally placed, creating a strong, balanced medallion silhouette. Color palette is limited to deep indigo, rich teal, metallic gold, and stark cream white, ensuring maximum contrast and print clarity. Use clean linework, thick outlines, and repeating patterns. Perfect for direct apparel printing on a dark background. High detail, vector art quality.
